infused-banana-bread.intro_unique: This moist banana bread uses overripe bananas to mask the herbal taste of cannabutter, making it one of the most beginner-friendly edibles you can bake.
infused-banana-bread.dosing_unique: Slice the loaf into 10 even pieces and label each with the per-slice dosage to avoid overconsumption.
infused-banana-bread.storage_unique: Wrap individual slices in parchment paper and freeze for up to 3 months; thaw at room temperature for 20 minutes before eating.
infused-banana-bread.variation_unique: Fold in dark chocolate chips and walnuts for a richer flavor that pairs especially well with the cannabis undertones.

infused-chocolate-truffles.intro_unique: These hand-rolled chocolate truffles deliver precise single servings of cannabis in a rich ganache shell that melts on your tongue.
infused-chocolate-truffles.dosing_unique: Use a small cookie scoop to portion the ganache so every truffle contains an identical amount of infused coconut oil.
infused-chocolate-truffles.storage_unique: Layer truffles between sheets of wax paper in an airtight container and refrigerate for up to 2 weeks.
infused-chocolate-truffles.variation_unique: Roll finished truffles in matcha powder, crushed freeze-dried raspberries, or toasted coconut for distinct flavor profiles.

pot-cookies.intro_unique: Classic cannabis cookies with a chewy center and crisp edges are the quintessential homemade edible that never goes out of style.
pot-cookies.dosing_unique: Use a tablespoon-sized dough scoop and weigh each ball on a kitchen scale to guarantee uniform dosing across the batch.
pot-cookies.storage_unique: Store in a sealed jar at room temperature for up to 5 days, or freeze baked cookies in a zip-lock bag for 2 months.
pot-cookies.variation_unique: Swap chocolate chips for peanut butter chips and add a pinch of sea salt on top before baking for a sweet-salty twist.

pot-brownies.intro_unique: Fudgy cannabis brownies are the most iconic edible of all time, combining deep cocoa flavor with the relaxing effects of THC.
pot-brownies.dosing_unique: Score the brownie slab into equal squares immediately after removing from the oven while the surface is still soft.
pot-brownies.storage_unique: Keep brownies in a sealed container at room temperature for 4 days, or individually wrap and freeze for up to 3 months.
pot-brownies.variation_unique: Swirl in a ribbon of cream cheese batter before baking to create a marbled cheesecake-brownie hybrid.

gummy-bears.intro_unique: Homemade cannabis gummy bears let you control the exact milligram dose per piece while choosing your own fruit flavors and colors.
gummy-bears.dosing_unique: Calculate the total THC in your tincture, divide by the number of mold cavities, and pipette the mixture precisely into each mold.
gummy-bears.storage_unique: Toss finished gummies in a light coating of cornstarch and store in the fridge for up to 3 weeks to prevent sticking.
gummy-bears.variation_unique: Use tart cherry juice instead of flavored gelatin for a natural sour gummy with real fruit flavor and antioxidants.

gingerbread-cookies.intro_unique: Warmly spiced gingerbread cookies infused with cannabutter are a festive holiday edible with bold molasses and ginger notes.
gingerbread-cookies.dosing_unique: Roll dough to a uniform thickness and use the same cookie cutter size throughout so every cookie carries the same dose.
gingerbread-cookies.storage_unique: Layer cooled cookies with parchment in a tin and store at room temperature for up to one week.
gingerbread-cookies.variation_unique: Dip half of each cookie in white chocolate and sprinkle with crushed candy cane for a peppermint-gingerbread combo.

infused-honey.intro_unique: Cannabis-infused honey is a versatile pantry staple you can stir into tea, drizzle over toast, or use as a sweetener in any recipe.
infused-honey.dosing_unique: Measure honey by the teaspoon and note the mg per teaspoon on the jar label so you always know your intake.
infused-honey.storage_unique: Keep in a dark glass jar at room temperature; infused honey remains potent and shelf-stable for up to 6 months.
infused-honey.variation_unique: Steep a few sprigs of lavender or rosemary into the honey during infusion for an herbal flavor that complements the cannabis.

weed-rice-krispie-treats.intro_unique: These nostalgic rice krispie treats get an adult upgrade with cannabutter melted directly into the marshmallow mixture for easy, no-bake preparation.
weed-rice-krispie-treats.dosing_unique: Press the mixture into a lined pan of known dimensions and cut into a grid of equal pieces for consistent dosing.
weed-rice-krispie-treats.storage_unique: Wrap each square individually in plastic wrap and store at room temperature for up to one week.
weed-rice-krispie-treats.variation_unique: Mix in a handful of mini M&Ms or drizzle melted dark chocolate over the top for extra indulgence.

cannabis-caramel-sauce.intro_unique: Silky cannabis caramel sauce adds a sweet, buttery drizzle of THC to ice cream, fruit, or your favorite desserts.
cannabis-caramel-sauce.dosing_unique: Measure servings with a tablespoon and note the total batch potency divided by the number of tablespoons on the jar.
cannabis-caramel-sauce.storage_unique: Refrigerate in a squeeze bottle for up to 3 weeks; reheat gently in warm water before drizzling.
cannabis-caramel-sauce.variation_unique: Stir in a teaspoon of espresso powder while cooking for a coffee-caramel sauce that pairs beautifully with vanilla ice cream.

cannabis-cheesecake.intro_unique: A creamy New York-style cheesecake infused with cannabutter in the crust and filling delivers an indulgent, long-lasting edible experience.
cannabis-cheesecake.dosing_unique: Slice the cheesecake into 12 equal portions using a hot knife for clean cuts and predictable per-slice potency.
cannabis-cheesecake.storage_unique: Cover with plastic wrap pressed directly on the surface and refrigerate for up to 5 days, or freeze slices for 2 months.
cannabis-cheesecake.variation_unique: Top with a layer of cannabis-infused fruit compote made from fresh berries for an extra dose and burst of color.

infused-tiramisu.intro_unique: This Italian classic layers espresso-soaked ladyfingers with cannabis-infused mascarpone cream for a sophisticated no-bake dessert.
infused-tiramisu.dosing_unique: Divide the mascarpone mixture into the exact number of servings before assembling so each portion is dosed equally.
infused-tiramisu.storage_unique: Keep covered in the fridge for up to 3 days; tiramisu actually improves in flavor after 24 hours of chilling.
infused-tiramisu.variation_unique: Replace the espresso soak with matcha tea for a green tea tiramisu that offers a lighter, earthier flavor.

cannabis-apple-pie.intro_unique: A golden, flaky-crusted apple pie made with cannabutter in the pastry delivers warm cinnamon-apple comfort with every slice.
cannabis-apple-pie.dosing_unique: Cut the pie into 8 equal slices using a pie marker pressed into the top crust before baking.
cannabis-apple-pie.storage_unique: Store loosely covered at room temperature for 2 days or refrigerate for up to 5 days; reheat slices in a 300F oven.
cannabis-apple-pie.variation_unique: Add a handful of fresh cranberries to the apple filling for tartness and a beautiful ruby-red color throughout.

infused-chocolate-lava-cake.intro_unique: Individual chocolate lava cakes with a molten cannabis-infused center create a dramatic restaurant-quality dessert at home.
infused-chocolate-lava-cake.dosing_unique: Prepare the batter in a single bowl and divide evenly among ramekins using a kitchen scale for identical per-cake dosing.
infused-chocolate-lava-cake.storage_unique: Freeze unbaked filled ramekins for up to 1 month; bake directly from frozen, adding 2 extra minutes to the cook time.
infused-chocolate-lava-cake.variation_unique: Add a small square of white chocolate in the center of each cake for a dual-chocolate molten core.

cannabis-lemon-bars.intro_unique: Tangy lemon curd atop a buttery cannabis-infused shortbread crust makes these bars a bright, citrusy alternative to chocolate edibles.
cannabis-lemon-bars.dosing_unique: Score the slab into uniform rectangles before the curd fully sets so each bar has a precise and equal dose.
cannabis-lemon-bars.storage_unique: Refrigerate in a single layer in an airtight container for up to 5 days; dust with powdered sugar just before serving.
cannabis-lemon-bars.variation_unique: Substitute lime juice and add a pinch of chili flakes for a spicy lime bar with a Mexican-inspired kick.

infused-carrot-cake.intro_unique: Moist carrot cake studded with walnuts and raisins pairs beautifully with cannabis-infused cream cheese frosting for a layered edible.
infused-carrot-cake.dosing_unique: Infuse only the frosting rather than the cake itself so you can control the dose by adjusting frosting thickness per slice.
infused-carrot-cake.storage_unique: Refrigerate frosted cake for up to 4 days; bring to room temperature 30 minutes before serving for the best texture.
infused-carrot-cake.variation_unique: Add crushed pineapple to the batter for extra moisture and a tropical twist on the classic carrot cake.

cannabis-coconut-macaroons.intro_unique: Chewy coconut macaroons dipped in cannabis-infused chocolate are naturally gluten-free and deliver a satisfying tropical sweetness.
cannabis-coconut-macaroons.dosing_unique: Use a small cookie scoop to form each macaroon and dip the base in a measured amount of infused chocolate.
cannabis-coconut-macaroons.storage_unique: Store in the refrigerator for up to one week; the chocolate coating keeps them fresh and holds the cannabis infusion.
cannabis-coconut-macaroons.variation_unique: Toast the shredded coconut before mixing for a deeper, nuttier flavor and golden-brown exterior.

infused-fudge.intro_unique: Rich, dense cannabis fudge is a no-bake confection that packs a potent dose into a small, decadent square.
infused-fudge.dosing_unique: Pour into a parchment-lined pan of known size and cut into a precise grid so each piece has an equal dose.
infused-fudge.storage_unique: Refrigerate in an airtight container for up to 2 weeks or freeze for 3 months; fudge thaws quickly at room temperature.
infused-fudge.variation_unique: Layer peanut butter fudge on top of the chocolate fudge for a two-tone Reese's-inspired treat.

cannabis-blondies.intro_unique: Cannabis blondies offer the chewy, butterscotch richness of a brownie without the cocoa, letting the cannabutter flavor shine through.
cannabis-blondies.dosing_unique: Bake in a square pan and slice into 16 uniform bars using a bench scraper for clean, equal portions.
cannabis-blondies.storage_unique: Store at room temperature in a sealed container for up to 5 days; blondies stay chewy longer than brownies.
cannabis-blondies.variation_unique: Add white chocolate chips and macadamia nuts for a tropical blondie with creamy, crunchy contrast.

infused-donut-holes.intro_unique: Bite-sized cannabis donut holes are fried until golden and tossed in cinnamon sugar for a fun, shareable edible treat.
infused-donut-holes.dosing_unique: Pipe dough through a round tip and cut to equal lengths before frying so each donut hole is the same size and dose.
infused-donut-holes.storage_unique: Best eaten the same day; store leftovers in a paper bag at room temperature for up to 24 hours.
infused-donut-holes.variation_unique: Fill donut holes with cannabis-infused pastry cream using a piping bag for a Boston cream-style surprise center.

cannabis-peach-cobbler.intro_unique: Warm cannabis peach cobbler with a golden biscuit topping celebrates summer fruit while delivering a comforting, slow-onset edible effect.
cannabis-peach-cobbler.dosing_unique: Use the same biscuit cutter for every topping round and distribute them evenly so each serving gets one biscuit and equal fruit.
cannabis-peach-cobbler.storage_unique: Cover and refrigerate for up to 3 days; reheat individual portions in a 325F oven for 10 minutes.
cannabis-peach-cobbler.variation_unique: Mix in fresh blueberries with the peaches for a peach-blueberry cobbler with a beautiful purple-gold color.

infused-baklava.intro_unique: Layers of crispy phyllo, spiced nuts, and cannabis-infused honey syrup make this Mediterranean pastry a unique and aromatic edible.
infused-baklava.dosing_unique: Score the baklava into diamonds before baking and pour a measured amount of infused syrup so each piece absorbs equally.
infused-baklava.storage_unique: Cover loosely and store at room temperature for up to one week; do not refrigerate or the phyllo will become soggy.
infused-baklava.variation_unique: Use pistachios instead of walnuts and add a splash of rosewater to the syrup for a Persian-inspired version.

cannabis-chocolate-fondue.intro_unique: Cannabis chocolate fondue turns any gathering into an interactive edible experience where guests dip fruit and treats into warm infused chocolate.
cannabis-chocolate-fondue.dosing_unique: Calculate the total mg in the fondue pot and provide small dipping cups so each guest controls their own portion.
cannabis-chocolate-fondue.storage_unique: Refrigerate leftover fondue in a jar for up to one week; reheat gently in a double boiler to restore the smooth texture.
cannabis-chocolate-fondue.variation_unique: Use dark chocolate with chili powder and a pinch of cayenne for a Mexican hot chocolate-style fondue.

infused-strawberry-shortcake.intro_unique: Flaky cannabis-infused biscuits topped with fresh strawberries and whipped cream create a light, elegant summer edible dessert.
infused-strawberry-shortcake.dosing_unique: Weigh each biscuit before baking to ensure equal cannabutter distribution and consistent dosing per serving.
infused-strawberry-shortcake.storage_unique: Store biscuits separately from the fruit and cream; assemble just before serving to keep everything fresh for up to 2 days.
infused-strawberry-shortcake.variation_unique: Macerate the strawberries with a splash of balsamic vinegar and black pepper to deepen their sweetness.

cannabis-panna-cotta.intro_unique: Silky cannabis panna cotta is an Italian custard that showcases infused cream in a delicate, melt-in-your-mouth dessert.
cannabis-panna-cotta.dosing_unique: Divide the warm cream mixture into individual ramekins using a measuring cup so each serving contains an identical dose.
cannabis-panna-cotta.storage_unique: Cover each ramekin with plastic wrap and refrigerate for up to 4 days; unmold just before serving.
cannabis-panna-cotta.variation_unique: Top with a thin layer of passion fruit coulis for a tropical contrast to the creamy vanilla base.

infused-churros.intro_unique: Crispy on the outside and soft within, these cannabis-infused churros are fried to golden perfection and rolled in cinnamon sugar.
infused-churros.dosing_unique: Pipe churro dough to the same length using a star tip and fry in batches of equal size for uniform dosing.
infused-churros.storage_unique: Eat churros fresh for the best texture; if storing, keep in a paper bag and re-crisp in a 375F oven for 5 minutes.
infused-churros.variation_unique: Serve with a side of cannabis chocolate dipping sauce for a double-dosed churro experience.

cannabis-crepes.intro_unique: Thin, delicate cannabis crepes can be filled with sweet or savory fillings, making them a versatile vehicle for your infusion.
cannabis-crepes.dosing_unique: Use exactly 3 tablespoons of batter per crepe and swirl evenly so the cannabutter is distributed uniformly in each one.
cannabis-crepes.storage_unique: Stack cooled crepes between sheets of parchment and refrigerate for 2 days or freeze for up to 1 month.
cannabis-crepes.variation_unique: Fill with Nutella and sliced bananas for a classic Parisian street-food combination with an infused twist.

infused-mango-sorbet.intro_unique: Dairy-free cannabis mango sorbet is a refreshing frozen edible with tropical sweetness and a smooth, scoopable texture.
infused-mango-sorbet.dosing_unique: Blend the infusion into the sorbet base before churning so it distributes evenly; use a standard scoop for serving.
infused-mango-sorbet.storage_unique: Store in a freezer-safe container with plastic wrap pressed on the surface to prevent ice crystals for up to 2 months.
infused-mango-sorbet.variation_unique: Add a squeeze of lime juice and a pinch of Tajin seasoning for a Mexican-inspired mango chile sorbet.

cannabis-cinnamon-rolls.intro_unique: Soft, pillowy cinnamon rolls swirled with cannabis-infused butter and topped with cream cheese glaze are a decadent weekend brunch edible.
cannabis-cinnamon-rolls.dosing_unique: Roll the dough to a uniform rectangle and slice into equal portions with dental floss for perfectly even rolls.
cannabis-cinnamon-rolls.storage_unique: Cover tightly and store at room temperature for 2 days; reheat in a 300F oven for 5 minutes to restore softness.
cannabis-cinnamon-rolls.variation_unique: Replace the cinnamon filling with a cardamom-orange zest mixture for a Scandinavian-inspired flavor profile.

infused-coconut-pudding.intro_unique: Creamy cannabis coconut pudding is a comforting, tropical dessert that sets up beautifully in individual cups for easy portion control.
infused-coconut-pudding.dosing_unique: Divide the warm pudding into serving cups using a ladle with a known volume so each cup gets the same dose.
infused-coconut-pudding.storage_unique: Cover cups with plastic wrap and refrigerate for up to 4 days; the pudding thickens further as it chills.
infused-coconut-pudding.variation_unique: Layer with toasted coconut flakes and a drizzle of mango puree for a tropical parfait presentation.

infused-berry-smoothie.intro_unique: A vibrant berry smoothie blended with cannabis tincture delivers a fruity, drinkable edible that kicks in smoothly.
infused-berry-smoothie.dosing_unique: Add your measured tincture dose to the blender last and blend briefly so it mixes evenly without degrading the cannabinoids.
infused-berry-smoothie.storage_unique: Drink immediately for the best texture; if needed, store in a sealed jar in the fridge for up to 4 hours.
infused-berry-smoothie.variation_unique: Add a scoop of protein powder and a handful of spinach for a post-workout recovery smoothie with benefits.

infused-lemonade.intro_unique: Refreshing cannabis lemonade is a simple, crowd-pleasing summer drink that hides the herbal flavor behind bright citrus.
infused-lemonade.dosing_unique: Mix the tincture into the full pitcher and stir thoroughly so each glass poured contains a consistent dose.
infused-lemonade.storage_unique: Refrigerate in a sealed pitcher for up to 2 days; stir well before each serving as the tincture may settle.
infused-lemonade.variation_unique: Muddle fresh mint and cucumber slices into each glass for a spa-style cannabis lemonade.

infused-whiskey.intro_unique: Cannabis-infused whiskey combines two adult indulgences into one spirit that can be sipped neat or mixed into cocktails.
infused-whiskey.dosing_unique: Start with a half-ounce pour since the combination of alcohol and THC intensifies both effects significantly.
infused-whiskey.storage_unique: Store in a dark glass bottle away from sunlight; infused whiskey stays potent indefinitely at room temperature.
infused-whiskey.variation_unique: Use a smoky bourbon and add a cinnamon stick during infusion for a warming, spiced winter spirit.

infused-chai.intro_unique: Warming cannabis chai combines aromatic spices like cardamom, cinnamon, and ginger with infused milk for a soothing hot edible.
infused-chai.dosing_unique: Prepare a single serving using one measured dose of infused milk per cup to maintain precise control over your intake.
infused-chai.storage_unique: Brew fresh for the best flavor; leftover chai concentrate without milk can be refrigerated for up to 3 days.
infused-chai.variation_unique: Add a shot of espresso for a dirty chai latte that combines caffeine alertness with the calming effects of THC.

infused-eggnog.intro_unique: Rich, creamy cannabis eggnog is a festive holiday beverage that blends warm spices with infused cream for a seasonal treat.
infused-eggnog.dosing_unique: Portion eggnog into 4-ounce servings since its richness and potency make smaller glasses more appropriate.
infused-eggnog.storage_unique: Refrigerate in a sealed bottle for up to 3 days; shake well before pouring as the mixture separates.
infused-eggnog.variation_unique: Sprinkle freshly grated nutmeg and a drizzle of caramel sauce on top for an elevated holiday presentation.

cannabis-hot-chocolate.intro_unique: Velvety cannabis hot chocolate is the ultimate cold-weather edible, melting infused chocolate into steamed milk for a cozy cup.
cannabis-hot-chocolate.dosing_unique: Melt a measured amount of infused chocolate per mug and whisk thoroughly into the hot milk for even distribution.
cannabis-hot-chocolate.storage_unique: Best served fresh; leftover hot chocolate can be refrigerated and reheated gently the next day.
cannabis-hot-chocolate.variation_unique: Float a cannabis-infused marshmallow on top for double the dose and a playful presentation.

infused-cold-brew.intro_unique: Smooth cannabis cold brew coffee steeps overnight with cannabis tincture for a caffeinated, uplifting edible drink.
infused-cold-brew.dosing_unique: Add the tincture to the finished cold brew concentrate rather than during steeping for more accurate dosing per glass.
infused-cold-brew.storage_unique: Store the infused concentrate in the fridge for up to 5 days; dilute with water or milk when serving.
infused-cold-brew.variation_unique: Add a splash of vanilla syrup and oat milk for a creamy, barista-style cannabis cold brew latte.

firecrackers.intro_unique: Firecrackers are the fastest cannabis edible you can make, requiring only graham crackers, peanut butter, and ground flower.
firecrackers.dosing_unique: Spread a precisely weighed amount of decarbed cannabis on each cracker and seal tightly in foil before baking.
firecrackers.storage_unique: Wrap each firecracker individually in foil and store at room temperature for up to 3 days.
firecrackers.variation_unique: Use Nutella instead of peanut butter and add a sprinkle of sea salt for a sweet-salty chocolate version.

infused-guacamole.intro_unique: Cannabis-infused guacamole blends ripe avocados with infused olive oil for a creamy, savory dip that pairs perfectly with chips.
infused-guacamole.dosing_unique: Stir in a measured amount of infused olive oil and mix thoroughly so the dose is evenly spread throughout the bowl.
infused-guacamole.storage_unique: Press plastic wrap directly onto the surface to prevent browning and refrigerate for up to 24 hours.
infused-guacamole.variation_unique: Add diced fresh mango and a squeeze of lime for a tropical guacamole that balances richness with bright fruit.

infused-energy-bites.intro_unique: No-bake cannabis energy bites packed with oats, nut butter, and honey provide a portable, protein-rich edible for on-the-go dosing.
infused-energy-bites.dosing_unique: Roll each bite using a tablespoon measure and weigh on a scale to guarantee identical dosing across the batch.
infused-energy-bites.storage_unique: Refrigerate in a sealed container for up to one week or freeze for 2 months; thaw for 5 minutes before eating.
infused-energy-bites.variation_unique: Add a scoop of cocoa powder and mini chocolate chips for a brownie batter-flavored energy bite.

infused-grilled-cheese.intro_unique: A golden, crispy cannabis grilled cheese sandwich uses cannabutter on the bread for a savory, melty comfort food edible.
infused-grilled-cheese.dosing_unique: Spread a measured amount of cannabutter on each slice of bread before grilling so every sandwich is dosed consistently.
infused-grilled-cheese.storage_unique: Eat immediately for the best texture; grilled cheese does not store well but the cannabutter can be prepped in advance.
infused-grilled-cheese.variation_unique: Add sliced tomato and a drizzle of pesto between the cheese layers for a caprese-style grilled cheese.

trail-mix.intro_unique: Cannabis trail mix combines infused honey-roasted nuts with dried fruit and chocolate for a portable, shelf-stable edible snack.
trail-mix.dosing_unique: Measure the total infused component, mix evenly, and portion into labeled snack bags with the dose marked on each.
trail-mix.storage_unique: Store in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 weeks; the nuts stay crunchy if kept sealed.
trail-mix.variation_unique: Add coconut flakes and dried pineapple for a tropical trail mix variation with island-inspired flavors.

weed-infused-popcorn.intro_unique: Cannabis-infused popcorn is a savory movie-night snack where melted cannabutter is drizzled over freshly popped kernels.
weed-infused-popcorn.dosing_unique: Melt a measured amount of cannabutter and toss with the popcorn in a large bowl for even coating and consistent dosing.
weed-infused-popcorn.storage_unique: Store in a paper bag or airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 days; re-crisp in a low oven if needed.
weed-infused-popcorn.variation_unique: Toss with nutritional yeast and garlic powder for a savory, cheese-flavored cannabis popcorn without dairy.

infused-hummus.intro_unique: Smooth cannabis hummus blends chickpeas with infused olive oil and tahini for a protein-packed savory dip with a mellow onset.
infused-hummus.dosing_unique: Add the infused olive oil during blending and divide the finished hummus into measured serving cups for precise dosing.
infused-hummus.storage_unique: Refrigerate in a sealed container with a thin layer of olive oil on top for up to 5 days.
infused-hummus.variation_unique: Blend in roasted red peppers for a smoky, vibrant hummus with a sweeter flavor profile.

infused-granola.intro_unique: Crunchy cannabis granola baked with infused coconut oil and honey is a versatile edible for topping yogurt or eating by the handful.
infused-granola.dosing_unique: Spread granola evenly on a sheet pan, bake, and portion into small bags with the dose labeled on each.
infused-granola.storage_unique: Store in an airtight jar at room temperature for up to 2 weeks; granola stays crunchiest when kept completely sealed.
infused-granola.variation_unique: Add dried tart cherries and dark chocolate chunks after baking for a cherry-chocolate granola mix.

cannabutter.intro_unique: Cannabutter is the foundational cannabis ingredient, infusing butter with decarbed flower through a slow, low-heat simmer.
cannabutter.dosing_unique: Calculate the total THC from your starting flower, account for extraction efficiency around 80%, and label the jar with mg per tablespoon.
cannabutter.storage_unique: Store in a sealed glass jar in the fridge for up to 2 months or freeze in silicone molds for up to 6 months.
cannabutter.variation_unique: Use cultured European-style butter with higher fat content for a richer flavor and potentially better THC extraction.

infused-olive-oil.intro_unique: Cannabis-infused olive oil is a heart-healthy, versatile base for savory edibles, dressings, and any recipe calling for cooking oil.
infused-olive-oil.dosing_unique: Note the total THC content and divide by the volume in tablespoons; label the bottle with mg per tablespoon.
infused-olive-oil.storage_unique: Store in a dark glass bottle in a cool cupboard for up to 3 months; olive oil resists rancidity better than butter.
infused-olive-oil.variation_unique: Infuse with fresh rosemary and garlic cloves alongside the cannabis for a flavored finishing oil.

infused-coconut-oil.intro_unique: Cannabis-infused coconut oil has the highest saturated fat content of any cooking oil, making it exceptionally efficient at binding THC.
infused-coconut-oil.dosing_unique: Pour into silicone ice cube molds for pre-measured tablespoon portions that are easy to pop out and use in recipes.
infused-coconut-oil.storage_unique: Coconut oil is shelf-stable at room temperature for up to 3 months; refrigerate for longer storage up to 6 months.
infused-coconut-oil.variation_unique: Use refined coconut oil for a neutral taste in recipes where you do not want coconut flavor.

infused-milk.intro_unique: Cannabis-infused milk provides a liquid base for hot drinks, cereals, and baking that distributes THC evenly throughout dairy.
infused-milk.dosing_unique: Use whole milk for the highest fat content and best extraction; measure servings in half-cup portions with labeled potency.
infused-milk.storage_unique: Refrigerate and use within 5 days, the same shelf life as regular milk; shake before each use.
infused-milk.variation_unique: Use heavy cream instead of milk for a more potent infusion with higher fat content and richer mouthfeel.

infused-condensed-milk.intro_unique: Cannabis-infused condensed milk is a sweet, thick base ideal for fudge, tres leches cake, and Brazilian desserts.
infused-condensed-milk.dosing_unique: The thick consistency makes it easy to measure by the tablespoon; note mg per tablespoon on the can or jar.
infused-condensed-milk.storage_unique: Refrigerate in a sealed jar for up to 2 weeks; the high sugar content acts as a natural preservative.
infused-condensed-milk.variation_unique: Simmer the sealed can in boiling water for 2 hours to create infused dulce de leche with a deeper caramel flavor.

infused-ghee.intro_unique: Cannabis-infused ghee is clarified butter with the milk solids removed, offering a nutty, high-smoke-point fat perfect for cooking.
infused-ghee.dosing_unique: Ghee is denser than butter, so weigh your portions rather than using volume measurements for accurate dosing.
infused-ghee.storage_unique: Ghee is shelf-stable at room temperature for up to 3 months; its low moisture content prevents spoilage.
infused-ghee.variation_unique: Infuse with turmeric and black pepper during preparation for a golden ghee with anti-inflammatory properties.

infused-pesto-pasta.intro_unique: Cannabis pesto pasta coats al dente noodles in a vibrant basil-and-infused-olive-oil sauce that tastes remarkably close to the classic.
infused-pesto-pasta.dosing_unique: Mix the infused olive oil into the pesto at the end and toss with weighed pasta portions for consistent dosing per plate.
infused-pesto-pasta.storage_unique: Refrigerate dressed pasta for up to 2 days; toss with a splash of olive oil when reheating to restore moisture.
infused-pesto-pasta.variation_unique: Use sun-dried tomato pesto instead of traditional basil for a richer, tangier sauce with deeper umami notes.

infused-coconut-curry.intro_unique: Fragrant cannabis coconut curry simmers vegetables and protein in an infused coconut milk sauce rich with spices and aromatics.
infused-coconut-curry.dosing_unique: Stir the infused coconut oil into the curry at the end of cooking and serve over measured portions of rice.
infused-coconut-curry.storage_unique: Refrigerate in airtight containers for up to 3 days; curry flavor actually improves overnight as the spices meld.
infused-coconut-curry.variation_unique: Add a tablespoon of red curry paste and a squeeze of lime for a Thai-inspired version with more heat.

infused-spaghetti-bolognese.intro_unique: A hearty cannabis bolognese sauce slow-simmered with infused olive oil clings to every strand of spaghetti for a satisfying dinner edible.
infused-spaghetti-bolognese.dosing_unique: Add infused oil to the finished sauce and stir well; serve over weighed pasta portions to control the dose per plate.
infused-spaghetti-bolognese.storage_unique: Freeze sauce in labeled portions for up to 2 months; thaw overnight in the fridge before reheating.
infused-spaghetti-bolognese.variation_unique: Use half ground beef and half Italian sausage for a more complex, spiced bolognese.

cannabis-avocado-toast.intro_unique: Cannabis avocado toast elevates the brunch staple by spreading mashed avocado mixed with infused olive oil on crusty sourdough.
cannabis-avocado-toast.dosing_unique: Mix a measured amount of infused olive oil into the mashed avocado before spreading so each slice is dosed evenly.
cannabis-avocado-toast.storage_unique: Prepare and eat immediately; avocado toast does not store well, but the infused oil can be prepped in advance.
cannabis-avocado-toast.variation_unique: Top with a poached egg, everything bagel seasoning, and red pepper flakes for a loaded avocado toast.

cannabis-salad-dressing.intro_unique: Cannabis salad dressing lets you dose any salad by whisking infused olive oil into a tangy vinaigrette base.
cannabis-salad-dressing.dosing_unique: Calculate mg per tablespoon of dressing and use a measured pour for each salad serving.
cannabis-salad-dressing.storage_unique: Shake well and refrigerate in a glass jar for up to one week; bring to room temperature before using if the oil solidifies.
cannabis-salad-dressing.variation_unique: Blend in roasted garlic and Dijon mustard for a creamy cannabis Caesar-style dressing.

cannabis-shakshuka.intro_unique: Cannabis shakshuka poaches eggs in a spiced tomato sauce enriched with infused olive oil for a one-pan brunch edible.
cannabis-shakshuka.dosing_unique: Drizzle the infused oil into the sauce before adding eggs, and serve each person one egg with an equal portion of sauce.
cannabis-shakshuka.storage_unique: Best eaten fresh; leftover sauce without eggs can be refrigerated for 2 days and reheated with fresh eggs.
cannabis-shakshuka.variation_unique: Crumble feta cheese and fresh herbs over the top just before serving for a Mediterranean finish.

infused-mushroom-risotto.intro_unique: Creamy cannabis mushroom risotto stirs infused butter into Arborio rice at the final stage for a luxurious, earthy Italian dish.
infused-mushroom-risotto.dosing_unique: Add a measured pat of cannabutter to each individual plate of risotto rather than the whole pot for precise per-serving dosing.
infused-mushroom-risotto.storage_unique: Risotto is best fresh but can be refrigerated for 1 day; reheat with a splash of broth to restore creaminess.
infused-mushroom-risotto.variation_unique: Use a mix of wild mushrooms like chanterelle and porcini for a more complex, woodsy flavor.

cannabis-thai-basil-chicken.intro_unique: Cannabis Thai basil chicken is a quick stir-fry that combines wok-fired chicken with fresh Thai basil and infused oil.
cannabis-thai-basil-chicken.dosing_unique: Toss the infused oil in at the end of cooking over low heat to preserve potency, and divide into equal servings.
cannabis-thai-basil-chicken.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 2 days; reheat in a hot wok or skillet to maintain the stir-fry texture.
cannabis-thai-basil-chicken.variation_unique: Substitute ground pork for chicken and add extra Thai chilies for a spicier, street-food-style version.

infused-beef-tacos.intro_unique: Seasoned cannabis beef tacos fold savory, infused-oil-cooked ground beef into warm tortillas with fresh toppings.
infused-beef-tacos.dosing_unique: Cook the beef with a measured amount of infused oil and weigh the meat per taco for consistent dosing.
infused-beef-tacos.storage_unique: Store cooked beef separately from tortillas and toppings in the fridge for up to 2 days; reheat meat before assembling.
infused-beef-tacos.variation_unique: Use corn tortillas and top with pickled red onions and cotija cheese for authentic Mexican-style street tacos.

cannabis-chicken-caesar-salad.intro_unique: Cannabis chicken Caesar salad dresses crisp romaine and grilled chicken with a creamy infused olive oil Caesar dressing.
cannabis-chicken-caesar-salad.dosing_unique: The infusion is in the dressing, so measure exactly 2 tablespoons of dressing per serving for predictable dosing.
cannabis-chicken-caesar-salad.storage_unique: Store dressing separately and toss with salad just before serving; dressed salad does not keep well.
cannabis-chicken-caesar-salad.variation_unique: Use kale instead of romaine and add shaved Parmesan and toasted pine nuts for a heartier kale Caesar.

infused-cauliflower-fried-rice.intro_unique: Cannabis cauliflower fried rice replaces grain with riced cauliflower stir-fried in infused oil for a low-carb savory edible.
infused-cauliflower-fried-rice.dosing_unique: Drizzle infused oil into the wok at the end of cooking and divide the fried rice into equal weighed portions.
infused-cauliflower-fried-rice.storage_unique: Refrigerate in airtight containers for up to 3 days; reheat in a hot skillet for the best texture.
infused-cauliflower-fried-rice.variation_unique: Add shrimp and a drizzle of toasted sesame oil for an Asian-inspired seafood fried rice.

cannabis-minestrone-soup.intro_unique: Hearty cannabis minestrone simmers seasonal vegetables, beans, and pasta in a tomato broth finished with infused olive oil.
cannabis-minestrone-soup.dosing_unique: Stir infused oil into the finished soup and ladle into bowls using a measured scoop for consistent per-serving potency.
cannabis-minestrone-soup.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 4 days or freeze without pasta for up to 2 months; add cooked pasta when reheating.
cannabis-minestrone-soup.variation_unique: Stir in a spoonful of pesto on top of each bowl for a Genovese-style minestrone with herbal depth.

infused-pulled-pork-sliders.intro_unique: Tender cannabis pulled pork sliders feature slow-cooked pork tossed in infused BBQ sauce and piled onto soft mini buns.
infused-pulled-pork-sliders.dosing_unique: Mix the infused oil into the BBQ sauce and weigh the pulled pork per slider for equal dosing on each bun.
infused-pulled-pork-sliders.storage_unique: Refrigerate pulled pork in sauce for up to 3 days; reheat gently and assemble sliders just before serving.
infused-pulled-pork-sliders.variation_unique: Top with a tangy coleslaw and pickled jalapenos for a Southern-style slider with crunch and heat.

cannabis-greek-salad.intro_unique: Cannabis Greek salad combines crisp cucumber, tomato, olives, and feta with a cannabis-infused olive oil and oregano dressing.
cannabis-greek-salad.dosing_unique: Whisk the infused oil into the dressing and drizzle a measured amount over each individual salad plate.
cannabis-greek-salad.storage_unique: Store undressed salad components in the fridge for up to 2 days; dress just before serving.
cannabis-greek-salad.variation_unique: Add marinated artichoke hearts and roasted red peppers for a more substantial Mediterranean salad.

infused-tomato-bisque.intro_unique: Velvety cannabis tomato bisque blends roasted tomatoes with infused cream for a smooth, warming soup with a rich finish.
infused-tomato-bisque.dosing_unique: Stir infused cream into the blended soup and ladle into bowls using a measured cup for precise per-serving dosing.
infused-tomato-bisque.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 4 days or freeze for 2 months; reheat gently without boiling to preserve the cream.
infused-tomato-bisque.variation_unique: Roast the tomatoes with garlic and smoked paprika before blending for a smokier, deeper flavor profile.

cannabis-chicken-burrito-bowl.intro_unique: A cannabis chicken burrito bowl layers seasoned chicken, rice, beans, and fresh toppings with infused oil for a complete meal edible.
cannabis-chicken-burrito-bowl.dosing_unique: Drizzle a measured amount of infused oil over each assembled bowl rather than cooking with it for more accurate dosing.
cannabis-chicken-burrito-bowl.storage_unique: Store components separately in the fridge for up to 3 days; assemble fresh bowls at mealtime.
cannabis-chicken-burrito-bowl.variation_unique: Use cauliflower rice instead of white rice and add pickled red onions for a lighter, tangier version.

infused-falafel-wrap.intro_unique: Crispy cannabis falafel wraps bundle herbed chickpea patties with tahini sauce and fresh vegetables in warm pita bread.
infused-falafel-wrap.dosing_unique: Mix infused oil into the falafel mixture before forming and use a scoop to make uniform patties with equal doses.
infused-falafel-wrap.storage_unique: Store cooked falafel in the fridge for up to 3 days; reheat in a 375F oven to re-crisp the exterior.
infused-falafel-wrap.variation_unique: Add harissa paste to the tahini sauce for a smoky, spicy North African kick.

cannabis-butternut-squash-soup.intro_unique: Silky cannabis butternut squash soup roasts the squash until caramelized, then blends it with infused cream for a naturally sweet bowl.
cannabis-butternut-squash-soup.dosing_unique: Stir infused cream into the blended soup and serve in measured ladles so each bowl has the same dose.
cannabis-butternut-squash-soup.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 4 days or freeze for up to 2 months; soup reheats beautifully without losing texture.
cannabis-butternut-squash-soup.variation_unique: Add a teaspoon of curry powder and a swirl of coconut cream for a Thai-inspired butternut squash soup.

infused-egg-fried-rice.intro_unique: Cannabis egg fried rice is a quick weeknight edible that transforms day-old rice with infused oil, scrambled eggs, and soy sauce.
infused-egg-fried-rice.dosing_unique: Add infused oil to the hot wok at the end and toss with the rice, then divide into equal portions by weight.
infused-egg-fried-rice.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 2 days; reheat in a very hot skillet to restore the slightly crispy texture.
infused-egg-fried-rice.variation_unique: Add diced Chinese sausage (lap cheong) and scallions for a Cantonese-style fried rice with sweet-savory depth.

cannabis-grilled-salmon.intro_unique: Cannabis grilled salmon glazes fresh fillets with an infused olive oil and herb marinade before searing on a hot grill.
cannabis-grilled-salmon.dosing_unique: Brush each fillet with a measured tablespoon of infused oil marinade so every portion has a known, equal dose.
cannabis-grilled-salmon.storage_unique: Refrigerate cooked salmon for up to 2 days; serve cold on salads or reheat gently in a 275F oven.
cannabis-grilled-salmon.variation_unique: Glaze with a miso-ginger infused oil mixture for an umami-rich Asian-inspired salmon.

infused-caprese-salad.intro_unique: Cannabis caprese salad drizzles infused olive oil over fresh mozzarella, ripe tomatoes, and fragrant basil for a simple Italian appetizer.
infused-caprese-salad.dosing_unique: Drizzle a measured teaspoon of infused oil over each individual plate for clean, consistent dosing.
infused-caprese-salad.storage_unique: Assemble and serve immediately; store the infused oil separately and slice ingredients fresh each time.
infused-caprese-salad.variation_unique: Use burrata instead of mozzarella and add a drizzle of aged balsamic reduction for an elevated presentation.

cannabis-quesadilla.intro_unique: Cannabis quesadillas crisp flour tortillas filled with melted cheese and a spread of cannabutter for a quick, satisfying edible meal.
cannabis-quesadilla.dosing_unique: Spread a measured amount of cannabutter on the inside of each tortilla before adding cheese and folding.
cannabis-quesadilla.storage_unique: Best served fresh and hot; store leftover filling separately and assemble new quesadillas when ready to eat.
cannabis-quesadilla.variation_unique: Add sauteed mushrooms, caramelized onions, and a drizzle of truffle oil for a gourmet quesadilla upgrade.

infused-pad-thai.intro_unique: Cannabis pad Thai tosses rice noodles with a sweet-tangy tamarind sauce, finishing with infused oil for an authentic Thai street food edible.
infused-pad-thai.dosing_unique: Toss infused oil into the finished noodles off heat and serve in weighed portions for equal dosing per plate.
infused-pad-thai.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 2 days; reheat in a wok with a splash of water to loosen the noodles.
infused-pad-thai.variation_unique: Add crispy tofu and extra crushed peanuts for a heartier vegetarian pad Thai with more protein.

cannabis-pizza.intro_unique: Cannabis pizza brushes the crust with infused olive oil before topping and baking for a shareable, crowd-friendly edible meal.
cannabis-pizza.dosing_unique: Brush a measured amount of infused oil on the dough and cut into equal slices so each piece has the same dose.
cannabis-pizza.storage_unique: Store leftover slices in the fridge for up to 2 days; reheat in a hot skillet for a crispy bottom crust.
cannabis-pizza.variation_unique: Top with fig jam, prosciutto, and arugula after baking for a gourmet pizza that showcases the infused oil base.

infused-lentil-dal.intro_unique: Cannabis lentil dal simmers red lentils with aromatic spices and finishes with a tadka of infused ghee for a warming, protein-rich edible.
infused-lentil-dal.dosing_unique: Drizzle the infused ghee tadka over individual bowls rather than the pot so each serving gets a measured dose.
infused-lentil-dal.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 4 days or freeze for 2 months; dal thickens as it cools so add water when reheating.
infused-lentil-dal.variation_unique: Add a can of diced tomatoes and a handful of fresh spinach for a more substantial and colorful dal.

infused-bulletproof-coffee.intro_unique: Cannabis bulletproof coffee blends hot coffee with infused coconut oil and grass-fed butter for a keto-friendly, energizing edible drink.
infused-bulletproof-coffee.dosing_unique: Add a measured tablespoon of infused coconut oil to each cup and blend until frothy for even distribution.
infused-bulletproof-coffee.storage_unique: Drink immediately; the emulsion breaks down as it cools and the fats separate.
infused-bulletproof-coffee.variation_unique: Add a tablespoon of MCT oil and a dash of cinnamon for enhanced ketone production and warm spice flavor.

infused-coconut-fat-bombs.intro_unique: Cannabis coconut fat bombs are bite-sized keto treats that pack infused coconut oil into a sweet, high-fat snack.
infused-coconut-fat-bombs.dosing_unique: Pour into silicone candy molds using a measured pipette or small spoon so each fat bomb is identically dosed.
infused-coconut-fat-bombs.storage_unique: Store in the freezer for up to 3 months; keep frozen as they melt quickly at room temperature.
infused-coconut-fat-bombs.variation_unique: Add a layer of sugar-free dark chocolate on top of each fat bomb for a bounty bar-inspired treat.

infused-keto-peanut-butter-cookies.intro_unique: Three-ingredient keto cannabis cookies use peanut butter, egg, and sweetener with infused coconut oil for a grain-free edible.
infused-keto-peanut-butter-cookies.dosing_unique: Scoop dough with a tablespoon measure and flatten with a fork for uniform cookies with consistent dosing.
infused-keto-peanut-butter-cookies.storage_unique: Store in an airtight container at room temperature for 3 days or refrigerate for up to one week.
infused-keto-peanut-butter-cookies.variation_unique: Use almond butter instead of peanut butter and press a sugar-free chocolate chip into each cookie before baking.

infused-keto-cheesecake-bites.intro_unique: Mini keto cheesecake bites in a nut crust deliver creamy, low-carb cannabis portions that satisfy sweet cravings without sugar.
infused-keto-cheesecake-bites.dosing_unique: Divide the filling evenly among muffin tin cups using a measured scoop so each bite contains the same dose.
infused-keto-cheesecake-bites.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 5 days or freeze for 2 months; thaw in the fridge for 1 hour before eating.
infused-keto-cheesecake-bites.variation_unique: Swirl sugar-free raspberry puree into the top of each cheesecake bite before chilling for a fruity marbled finish.

infused-keto-chocolate-avocado-mousse.intro_unique: Keto cannabis chocolate avocado mousse blends ripe avocado with cocoa and infused coconut oil for a silky, dairy-free dessert.
infused-keto-chocolate-avocado-mousse.dosing_unique: Blend all ingredients together and divide into ramekins using a measuring cup for exact per-serving potency.
infused-keto-chocolate-avocado-mousse.storage_unique: Refrigerate covered for up to 2 days; the avocado may oxidize slightly but a stir restores the color.
infused-keto-chocolate-avocado-mousse.variation_unique: Top with whipped coconut cream and cacao nibs for a crunchy, indulgent garnish.

infused-keto-cauliflower-pizza-crust.intro_unique: A cannabis-infused cauliflower pizza crust gives keto dieters a low-carb base for all their favorite pizza toppings.
infused-keto-cauliflower-pizza-crust.dosing_unique: Mix infused oil into the cauliflower dough before pressing into shape; cut the baked pizza into equal slices.
infused-keto-cauliflower-pizza-crust.storage_unique: Freeze unbaked crusts between parchment sheets for up to 2 months; bake directly from frozen.
infused-keto-cauliflower-pizza-crust.variation_unique: Add Italian herbs and garlic powder to the crust mixture for a more flavorful, seasoned base.

infused-chocolate-bark.intro_unique: Cannabis chocolate bark is a simple no-bake keto treat that spreads melted infused chocolate thin and tops it with nuts and seeds.
infused-chocolate-bark.dosing_unique: Spread chocolate to a uniform thickness on a parchment-lined sheet and score into equal pieces before it fully sets.
infused-chocolate-bark.storage_unique: Store in the fridge for up to 2 weeks; the bark snaps cleanly along scored lines when cold.
infused-chocolate-bark.variation_unique: Use white chocolate with freeze-dried strawberries and crushed pistachios for a colorful, fruity bark.

cannabis-keto-bacon-bites.intro_unique: Crispy cannabis keto bacon bites wrap bacon around cream cheese filling infused with coconut oil for a savory, high-fat appetizer.
cannabis-keto-bacon-bites.dosing_unique: Fill each bacon cup with a measured teaspoon of infused cream cheese mixture for uniform dosing.
cannabis-keto-bacon-bites.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 3 days; reheat in a 350F oven for 5 minutes to re-crisp the bacon.
cannabis-keto-bacon-bites.variation_unique: Add diced jalapeno to the cream cheese filling for a spicy, popper-style bacon bite.

infused-keto-chicken-wings.intro_unique: Cannabis keto chicken wings are baked until crispy and tossed in an infused butter hot sauce for a finger-licking edible.
infused-keto-chicken-wings.dosing_unique: Toss wings in a measured amount of infused butter sauce and count the number of wings per serving for dosing accuracy.
infused-keto-chicken-wings.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 3 days; reheat in a 400F oven to maintain crispiness rather than microwaving.
infused-keto-chicken-wings.variation_unique: Use a garlic parmesan infused butter sauce instead of hot sauce for a milder, savory wing option.

cannabis-keto-deviled-eggs.intro_unique: Cannabis keto deviled eggs pipe a creamy, infused yolk filling back into halved egg whites for an elegant low-carb appetizer.
cannabis-keto-deviled-eggs.dosing_unique: Mix infused oil into the yolk filling and pipe an equal amount into each egg half for consistent per-piece dosing.
cannabis-keto-deviled-eggs.storage_unique: Refrigerate on a covered plate for up to 2 days; garnish with paprika just before serving.
cannabis-keto-deviled-eggs.variation_unique: Top each egg with a small piece of smoked salmon and a sprig of dill for a luxurious appetizer.

infused-keto-stuffed-mushrooms.intro_unique: Cannabis keto stuffed mushrooms fill cremini caps with an infused cream cheese and sausage mixture baked until bubbly and golden.
infused-keto-stuffed-mushrooms.dosing_unique: Use a measured teaspoon of filling per mushroom cap so each piece delivers the same dose.
infused-keto-stuffed-mushrooms.storage_unique: Refrigerate assembled mushrooms for up to 2 days before baking, or store baked leftovers for 3 days.
infused-keto-stuffed-mushrooms.variation_unique: Use crabmeat instead of sausage and add Old Bay seasoning for a seafood-stuffed mushroom variation.

cannabis-keto-beef-chili.intro_unique: Hearty cannabis keto beef chili slow-cooks ground beef with tomatoes and spices, finished with a drizzle of infused oil for a no-bean, low-carb bowl.
cannabis-keto-beef-chili.dosing_unique: Stir infused oil into the finished chili and serve with a ladle of known volume for consistent per-bowl dosing.
cannabis-keto-beef-chili.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 4 days or freeze for up to 2 months; chili flavor deepens overnight.
cannabis-keto-beef-chili.variation_unique: Add diced poblano peppers and a dollop of sour cream for a smoky, creamy chili topping.

infused-keto-zucchini-chips.intro_unique: Thin-sliced cannabis keto zucchini chips are baked until crispy after being brushed with infused olive oil and seasoned with salt.
infused-keto-zucchini-chips.dosing_unique: Brush each chip with a uniform coating of infused oil and count chips per serving for accurate dosing.
infused-keto-zucchini-chips.storage_unique: Store in a paper bag at room temperature for up to 2 days; they lose crispness in sealed containers.
infused-keto-zucchini-chips.variation_unique: Sprinkle with smoked paprika and garlic powder before baking for a BBQ-flavored chip.

cannabis-keto-waffles.intro_unique: Fluffy cannabis keto waffles use almond flour and infused coconut oil to create a grain-free breakfast that crisps beautifully in the iron.
cannabis-keto-waffles.dosing_unique: Pour a measured amount of batter per waffle using a ladle so each waffle is the same size and dose.
cannabis-keto-waffles.storage_unique: Freeze cooked waffles on a sheet pan then transfer to a zip-lock bag; toast from frozen for a quick breakfast.
cannabis-keto-waffles.variation_unique: Add a teaspoon of vanilla extract and top with sugar-free maple syrup and fresh berries.

infused-keto-salmon-patties.intro_unique: Cannabis keto salmon patties bind flaked salmon with egg and almond flour, pan-fried in infused oil for a protein-rich edible.
infused-keto-salmon-patties.dosing_unique: Form patties to the same weight using a kitchen scale and cook each in a measured amount of infused oil.
infused-keto-salmon-patties.storage_unique: Refrigerate cooked patties for up to 3 days; reheat in a skillet to maintain the crispy exterior.
infused-keto-salmon-patties.variation_unique: Add lemon zest and fresh dill to the patty mixture and serve with a sugar-free tartar sauce.

cannabis-keto-spinach-dip.intro_unique: Warm cannabis keto spinach dip blends cream cheese, spinach, and infused oil into a bubbly, savory appetizer for low-carb dipping.
cannabis-keto-spinach-dip.dosing_unique: Stir infused oil into the dip and serve with measured portions using a small ladle or serving spoon.
cannabis-keto-spinach-dip.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 4 days; reheat in the oven at 350F until bubbly.
cannabis-keto-spinach-dip.variation_unique: Add artichoke hearts and sun-dried tomatoes for a Mediterranean-inspired spinach artichoke dip.

infused-keto-almond-flour-cake.intro_unique: A moist cannabis keto almond flour cake has a tender crumb and nutty flavor that rivals wheat-based cakes without the carbs.
infused-keto-almond-flour-cake.dosing_unique: Bake in a round pan and cut into 12 even slices; the infused coconut oil distributes evenly through the dense batter.
infused-keto-almond-flour-cake.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 5 days; the almond flour keeps the cake moist longer than traditional flour would.
infused-keto-almond-flour-cake.variation_unique: Add lemon zest and a sugar-free lemon glaze for a bright, citrusy keto cake.

cannabis-vegan-brownies.intro_unique: Dense, fudgy cannabis vegan brownies use flax eggs and infused coconut oil to deliver a plant-based edible indistinguishable from the original.
cannabis-vegan-brownies.dosing_unique: Cut the brownie slab into equal squares with a bench scraper and label each piece with its dose for safe sharing.
cannabis-vegan-brownies.storage_unique: Store in an airtight container at room temperature for 3 days or freeze individually wrapped for 2 months.
cannabis-vegan-brownies.variation_unique: Add a swirl of almond butter on top before baking for a nutty, marbled vegan brownie.

infused-vegan-cheese-sauce.intro_unique: Creamy cannabis vegan cheese sauce blends soaked cashews with nutritional yeast and infused coconut oil for a dairy-free nacho topping.
infused-vegan-cheese-sauce.dosing_unique: Blend a measured amount of infused oil into the sauce and pour measured portions over individual servings.
infused-vegan-cheese-sauce.storage_unique: Refrigerate in a jar for up to 5 days; reheat gently and add water to thin if needed.
infused-vegan-cheese-sauce.variation_unique: Add chipotle peppers in adobo sauce for a smoky, spicy vegan queso dip.

cannabis-lentil-soup.intro_unique: Hearty cannabis lentil soup simmers lentils with aromatic vegetables and finishes with a drizzle of infused olive oil for a nourishing vegan edible.
cannabis-lentil-soup.dosing_unique: Stir infused oil into the finished soup and ladle into bowls using a measured scoop for per-serving dosing.
cannabis-lentil-soup.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 5 days or freeze for up to 3 months; lentil soup freezes exceptionally well.
cannabis-lentil-soup.variation_unique: Add a squeeze of lemon and a handful of fresh parsley before serving for brightness and color.

infused-vegan-pancakes.intro_unique: Fluffy cannabis vegan pancakes use plant milk and infused coconut oil in a simple batter that cooks up golden and tender.
infused-vegan-pancakes.dosing_unique: Pour a measured quarter-cup of batter per pancake so each one has an identical dose of infused coconut oil.
infused-vegan-pancakes.storage_unique: Freeze cooked pancakes in a single layer then stack with parchment; reheat in a toaster for a quick breakfast.
infused-vegan-pancakes.variation_unique: Fold fresh blueberries into the batter and top with pure maple syrup for a classic blueberry pancake stack.

cannabis-sweet-potato-curry.intro_unique: Cannabis sweet potato curry combines tender roasted sweet potato cubes with a rich coconut-infused sauce and fragrant spices.
cannabis-sweet-potato-curry.dosing_unique: Stir infused coconut oil into the curry at the end and serve over measured portions of rice or flatbread.
cannabis-sweet-potato-curry.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 4 days; the sweet potato holds its shape well when reheated.
cannabis-sweet-potato-curry.variation_unique: Add chickpeas and a handful of spinach in the last 5 minutes of cooking for added protein and greens.

infused-jackfruit-tacos.intro_unique: Cannabis jackfruit tacos shred young green jackfruit into a pulled-pork texture and season it with infused oil and smoky spices.
infused-jackfruit-tacos.dosing_unique: Mix infused oil into the jackfruit filling while cooking and weigh the filling per taco for consistent dosing.
infused-jackfruit-tacos.storage_unique: Store the seasoned jackfruit filling in the fridge for up to 3 days; reheat and assemble tacos fresh.
infused-jackfruit-tacos.variation_unique: Top with a pineapple-jalapeno slaw for a sweet-heat contrast that brightens the smoky jackfruit.

cannabis-vegan-chocolate-mousse.intro_unique: Silky cannabis vegan chocolate mousse whips aquafaba with melted dark chocolate and infused coconut oil into an airy, dairy-free dessert.
cannabis-vegan-chocolate-mousse.dosing_unique: Fold infused oil into the chocolate base before adding the whipped aquafaba, then divide into individual cups.
cannabis-vegan-chocolate-mousse.storage_unique: Refrigerate covered for up to 3 days; the mousse firms up slightly but maintains its silky texture.
cannabis-vegan-chocolate-mousse.variation_unique: Top with coconut whipped cream and a pinch of flaky sea salt for an elegant, salted chocolate finish.

infused-vegan-mac-and-cheese.intro_unique: Cannabis vegan mac and cheese coats elbow pasta in a cashew-based cheese sauce enriched with infused coconut oil for a comforting plant-based edible.
infused-vegan-mac-and-cheese.dosing_unique: Blend infused oil into the cheese sauce and measure pasta portions by weight so each bowl gets the same dose.
infused-vegan-mac-and-cheese.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 3 days; add a splash of plant milk when reheating to restore the creamy sauce.
infused-vegan-mac-and-cheese.variation_unique: Top with herbed breadcrumbs and bake at 375F for 15 minutes for a crispy-topped vegan mac.

cannabis-coconut-milk-ice-cream.intro_unique: Cannabis coconut milk ice cream churns full-fat coconut milk with infused coconut oil into a creamy, dairy-free frozen edible.
cannabis-coconut-milk-ice-cream.dosing_unique: Mix infused oil into the ice cream base before churning for even distribution; use a standard scoop for serving.
cannabis-coconut-milk-ice-cream.storage_unique: Store in a freezer-safe container for up to 2 months; let soften at room temperature for 5 minutes before scooping.
cannabis-coconut-milk-ice-cream.variation_unique: Swirl in a ribbon of salted caramel sauce and chopped roasted peanuts for a vegan sundae experience.

infused-chickpea-stew.intro_unique: Cannabis chickpea stew simmers chickpeas with tomatoes and warm spices, finished with infused olive oil for a hearty vegan edible.
infused-chickpea-stew.dosing_unique: Drizzle infused oil into each bowl individually using a measured spoon rather than mixing into the whole pot.
infused-chickpea-stew.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 5 days or freeze for 3 months; stew actually improves in flavor the next day.
infused-chickpea-stew.variation_unique: Add preserved lemon and green olives for a Moroccan-inspired chickpea tagine variation.

cannabis-vegan-protein-balls.intro_unique: Cannabis vegan protein balls combine plant protein powder, oats, and infused coconut oil into no-bake bites for post-workout recovery.
cannabis-vegan-protein-balls.dosing_unique: Roll each ball using a tablespoon measure and weigh on a scale for uniform dosing across the batch.
cannabis-vegan-protein-balls.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to one week or freeze for up to 2 months; they hold together well straight from the freezer.
cannabis-vegan-protein-balls.variation_unique: Roll in shredded coconut or cacao powder for different coatings that add flavor and visual variety.

infused-vegan-pesto-zoodles.intro_unique: Cannabis vegan pesto zoodles toss spiralized zucchini in a dairy-free basil pesto made with infused olive oil and pine nuts.
infused-vegan-pesto-zoodles.dosing_unique: Mix a measured amount of infused oil into the pesto and toss with weighed portions of zoodles for accurate dosing.
infused-vegan-pesto-zoodles.storage_unique: Eat immediately; zucchini noodles release water quickly and do not store well once dressed.
infused-vegan-pesto-zoodles.variation_unique: Add cherry tomatoes and marinated artichoke hearts for a Mediterranean zoodle bowl with more substance.

cannabis-black-bean-soup.intro_unique: Smoky cannabis black bean soup blends simmered black beans with cumin and infused olive oil for a thick, protein-rich vegan edible.
cannabis-black-bean-soup.dosing_unique: Stir infused oil into the finished soup and serve in measured ladles; partially blending creates a thicker, more even consistency.
cannabis-black-bean-soup.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 5 days or freeze for up to 3 months; the soup thickens as it cools so add water when reheating.
cannabis-black-bean-soup.variation_unique: Top each bowl with diced avocado, a dollop of vegan sour cream, and a sprinkle of smoked paprika.

infused-vegan-banana-ice-cream.intro_unique: One-ingredient cannabis banana ice cream blends frozen bananas with infused coconut oil for the easiest vegan frozen edible imaginable.
infused-vegan-banana-ice-cream.dosing_unique: Add a measured amount of infused oil per banana used and blend until smooth for per-scoop dosing consistency.
infused-vegan-banana-ice-cream.storage_unique: Serve immediately for soft-serve texture, or freeze for 1 hour for a firmer scoop; best consumed the same day.
infused-vegan-banana-ice-cream.variation_unique: Blend in a tablespoon of peanut butter and a handful of chocolate chips for a chunky monkey flavor.

cannabis-roasted-vegetable-medley.intro_unique: Cannabis roasted vegetable medley tosses seasonal vegetables in infused olive oil and roasts them until caramelized and tender.
cannabis-roasted-vegetable-medley.dosing_unique: Toss vegetables with a measured amount of infused oil and divide the roasted medley into equal portions by weight.
cannabis-roasted-vegetable-medley.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 4 days; roasted vegetables reheat well in a 400F oven for 10 minutes.
cannabis-roasted-vegetable-medley.variation_unique: Add a balsamic glaze drizzle and crumbled vegan feta after roasting for a sweet-tangy finish.

cannabis-sparkling-lemonade.intro_unique: Bubbly cannabis sparkling lemonade combines fresh lemon juice and sparkling water with cannabis tincture for a festive, alcohol-free refresher.
cannabis-sparkling-lemonade.dosing_unique: Add tincture to each glass individually rather than the pitcher so every guest gets their preferred dose.
cannabis-sparkling-lemonade.storage_unique: Mix fresh for each serving; sparkling water goes flat within an hour if stored.
cannabis-sparkling-lemonade.variation_unique: Add a splash of elderflower syrup and garnish with a sprig of thyme for a botanical sparkling lemonade.

infused-virgin-mojito.intro_unique: An infused virgin mojito muddles fresh mint and lime with cannabis tincture and sparkling water for a crisp, herbaceous mocktail.
infused-virgin-mojito.dosing_unique: Add a measured dropper of tincture to each glass after muddling the mint and lime.
infused-virgin-mojito.storage_unique: Prepare and serve immediately; the mint wilts and the sparkling water flattens if left standing.
infused-virgin-mojito.variation_unique: Muddle fresh watermelon chunks along with the mint for a watermelon virgin mojito with natural pink color.

cannabis-cucumber-mint-cooler.intro_unique: A cannabis cucumber mint cooler blends cool cucumber with fresh mint and a dose of tincture for a spa-like, calming mocktail.
cannabis-cucumber-mint-cooler.dosing_unique: Stir tincture into each individual glass and garnish with a cucumber ribbon for an elegant per-serving dose.
cannabis-cucumber-mint-cooler.storage_unique: Refrigerate the cucumber-mint base without tincture for up to 24 hours; add tincture and ice when serving.
cannabis-cucumber-mint-cooler.variation_unique: Add a few slices of fresh jalapeno for a spicy cucumber cooler with a surprising kick.

infused-watermelon-slush.intro_unique: Frozen cannabis watermelon slush blends fresh watermelon and ice with tincture for a frosty, hydrating summer mocktail.
infused-watermelon-slush.dosing_unique: Add tincture to the blender with the watermelon and ice so it distributes evenly; pour into equal-sized glasses.
infused-watermelon-slush.storage_unique: Serve immediately; the slush melts quickly and loses its frozen texture within 15 minutes.
infused-watermelon-slush.variation_unique: Add a handful of frozen strawberries for a strawberry-watermelon slush with deeper berry flavor.

cannabis-lavender-lemonade.intro_unique: Cannabis lavender lemonade steeps dried lavender into a simple syrup and combines it with lemon juice and tincture for a floral, soothing drink.
cannabis-lavender-lemonade.dosing_unique: Mix tincture into the completed lavender lemonade and stir well; pour measured glasses for consistent dosing.
cannabis-lavender-lemonade.storage_unique: Refrigerate the lavender lemonade base for up to 3 days; add tincture to individual servings.
cannabis-lavender-lemonade.variation_unique: Add a splash of butterfly pea flower tea for a color-changing lemonade that turns purple with the lemon acid.

infused-tropical-punch.intro_unique: Cannabis tropical punch combines pineapple, orange, and passion fruit juices with tincture for a vibrant party-ready mocktail.
infused-tropical-punch.dosing_unique: Stir tincture into the full punch bowl and use a ladle of known volume so each cup poured has an equal dose.
infused-tropical-punch.storage_unique: Refrigerate the punch base for up to 2 days; stir before serving as the tincture may settle.
infused-tropical-punch.variation_unique: Float scoops of mango sorbet in the punch bowl for a creamy, tropical float effect.

cannabis-strawberry-basil-smash.intro_unique: A cannabis strawberry basil smash muddles ripe strawberries with fresh basil and tincture for a sweet, herbaceous mocktail with depth.
cannabis-strawberry-basil-smash.dosing_unique: Add a measured dose of tincture to each glass after muddling the fruit and basil.
cannabis-strawberry-basil-smash.storage_unique: Serve immediately; muddled strawberries oxidize and lose their vibrant color within an hour.
cannabis-strawberry-basil-smash.variation_unique: Add a splash of balsamic vinegar for an Italian-inspired strawberry basil drink with savory undertones.

infused-hibiscus-tea.intro_unique: Ruby-red infused hibiscus tea steeps dried hibiscus flowers with cannabis tincture for a tart, antioxidant-rich hot or iced drink.
infused-hibiscus-tea.dosing_unique: Add tincture to each cup individually after steeping so the heat does not degrade the cannabinoids.
infused-hibiscus-tea.storage_unique: Refrigerate the brewed hibiscus tea for up to 4 days; add tincture to each serving when ready to drink.
infused-hibiscus-tea.variation_unique: Steep with a cinnamon stick and whole cloves for a warm, mulled hibiscus tea perfect for cold evenings.

cannabis-peach-iced-tea.intro_unique: Cannabis peach iced tea infuses black tea with fresh peach puree and a dose of tincture for a sweet Southern-style mocktail.
cannabis-peach-iced-tea.dosing_unique: Stir tincture into the chilled tea and pour measured glasses; the peach puree helps mask any herbal tincture flavor.
cannabis-peach-iced-tea.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 2 days; shake or stir before serving as the peach puree settles.
cannabis-peach-iced-tea.variation_unique: Add a sprig of rosemary and a drizzle of honey for an herbal peach tea with floral aromatics.

infused-mango-lassi.intro_unique: A thick, creamy infused mango lassi blends ripe mango with yogurt and cannabis tincture for a traditional Indian drink with a twist.
infused-mango-lassi.dosing_unique: Blend tincture into each individual lassi serving so you can control the dose per glass precisely.
infused-mango-lassi.storage_unique: Drink immediately or refrigerate for up to 4 hours; the yogurt separates if left too long.
infused-mango-lassi.variation_unique: Add a pinch of cardamom and saffron threads for an authentic, fragrant lassi with golden hue.

cannabis-rose-lemonade.intro_unique: Delicate cannabis rose lemonade blends rosewater and fresh lemon juice with tincture for a beautifully pink, floral mocktail.
cannabis-rose-lemonade.dosing_unique: Add tincture to each glass and stir; the rosewater flavor pairs well with and masks the herbal tincture notes.
cannabis-rose-lemonade.storage_unique: Refrigerate the rose lemonade base for up to 3 days; add tincture to individual servings when ready.
cannabis-rose-lemonade.variation_unique: Garnish with edible rose petals and a sugar rim for a stunning presentation at special occasions.

infused-pineapple-ginger-fizz.intro_unique: Zesty infused pineapple ginger fizz combines fresh pineapple juice with ginger beer and tincture for a bubbly, spicy-sweet mocktail.
infused-pineapple-ginger-fizz.dosing_unique: Add tincture to each glass before topping with ginger beer; stir gently to avoid losing carbonation.
infused-pineapple-ginger-fizz.storage_unique: Serve immediately; the ginger beer loses its fizz quickly once opened and mixed.
infused-pineapple-ginger-fizz.variation_unique: Add a splash of turmeric juice and a pinch of black pepper for an anti-inflammatory golden fizz.

cannabis-cranberry-spritzer.intro_unique: Tart cannabis cranberry spritzer mixes unsweetened cranberry juice with sparkling water and tincture for a festive, low-sugar mocktail.
cannabis-cranberry-spritzer.dosing_unique: Add tincture to each glass individually and top with sparkling water for a measured, effervescent dose.
cannabis-cranberry-spritzer.storage_unique: Store the cranberry juice base in the fridge for up to 5 days; add sparkling water and tincture when serving.
cannabis-cranberry-spritzer.variation_unique: Add a splash of pomegranate juice and garnish with fresh rosemary for a holiday-themed spritzer.

infused-matcha-cooler.intro_unique: An infused matcha cooler whisks ceremonial-grade matcha with iced oat milk and cannabis tincture for an earthy, energizing green drink.
infused-matcha-cooler.dosing_unique: Whisk tincture into the matcha paste before adding milk so it integrates fully into the drink.
infused-matcha-cooler.storage_unique: Serve immediately; matcha settles and the drink loses its vibrant green color if stored.
infused-matcha-cooler.variation_unique: Add a splash of vanilla syrup and serve over ice for a matcha vanilla iced latte with cannabis.

cannabis-passion-fruit-lemonade.intro_unique: Tropical cannabis passion fruit lemonade combines tangy passion fruit pulp with fresh lemon juice and tincture for an exotic, sunny mocktail.
cannabis-passion-fruit-lemonade.dosing_unique: Mix tincture into the lemonade base and stir well; strain the passion fruit seeds or leave them for texture.
cannabis-passion-fruit-lemonade.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 2 days; stir before serving as the passion fruit pulp separates.
cannabis-passion-fruit-lemonade.variation_unique: Add coconut water instead of still water for a tropical island-inspired passion fruit coconut lemonade.

infused-cherry-limeade.intro_unique: Bold infused cherry limeade combines tart cherry juice with fresh lime and cannabis tincture for a retro-diner-style mocktail.
infused-cherry-limeade.dosing_unique: Add tincture to each glass with measured cherry juice and lime for consistent per-serving dosing.
infused-cherry-limeade.storage_unique: Refrigerate the cherry-lime base for up to 3 days; add tincture and ice when serving.
infused-cherry-limeade.variation_unique: Use frozen dark sweet cherries muddled in the glass for a fresh, chunky cherry limeade with more fruit.

cannabis-mint-green-tea.intro_unique: Cannabis mint green tea steeps loose-leaf green tea with fresh mint and adds tincture for a light, refreshing hot or iced edible drink.
cannabis-mint-green-tea.dosing_unique: Steep tea first, then add tincture to each cup after cooling slightly to preserve cannabinoid potency.
cannabis-mint-green-tea.storage_unique: Refrigerate brewed tea for up to 2 days; add tincture to individual servings when ready to drink.
cannabis-mint-green-tea.variation_unique: Add a teaspoon of honey and a squeeze of lemon for a Moroccan-inspired sweetened mint tea.

infused-blueberry-lemonade.intro_unique: Vibrant infused blueberry lemonade blends fresh blueberries with lemon juice and tincture for a stunning purple mocktail packed with antioxidants.
infused-blueberry-lemonade.dosing_unique: Blend tincture into the blueberry puree before straining and mixing with lemonade for even distribution.
infused-blueberry-lemonade.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 2 days; shake before serving as the blueberry puree settles to the bottom.
infused-blueberry-lemonade.variation_unique: Add a splash of coconut cream for a creamy blueberry lemonade smoothie with a tropical twist.

cannabis-ginger-turmeric-tonic.intro_unique: A warming cannabis ginger turmeric tonic combines anti-inflammatory ginger and turmeric with tincture, honey, and lemon for a wellness-focused mocktail.
cannabis-ginger-turmeric-tonic.dosing_unique: Mix tincture into each cup after the tonic cools to drinking temperature to preserve the cannabinoids.
cannabis-ginger-turmeric-tonic.storage_unique: Refrigerate the ginger-turmeric base for up to 5 days; reheat gently and add tincture when serving.
cannabis-ginger-turmeric-tonic.variation_unique: Add a pinch of cayenne pepper and apple cider vinegar for a fire cider-inspired immune-boosting tonic.

infused-coconut-lime-agua-fresca.intro_unique: A light infused coconut lime agua fresca blends coconut water with fresh lime juice and tincture for a hydrating, tropical mocktail.
infused-coconut-lime-agua-fresca.dosing_unique: Add tincture to the full pitcher and stir thoroughly; pour equal-sized glasses for consistent dosing.
infused-coconut-lime-agua-fresca.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 2 days; the coconut water keeps the drink fresh and naturally sweet.
infused-coconut-lime-agua-fresca.variation_unique: Add muddled fresh mint and a splash of pineapple juice for a pina colada-inspired agua fresca.

cannabis-feijoada.intro_unique: Cannabis feijoada is a rich Brazilian black bean and pork stew simmered with infused olive oil, served over rice with traditional sides.
cannabis-feijoada.dosing_unique: Stir infused oil into the stew at the end of cooking and serve with a measured ladle for per-bowl dosing.
cannabis-feijoada.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 4 days or freeze for 2 months; feijoada tastes even better the next day.
cannabis-feijoada.variation_unique: Add sliced Portuguese linguica sausage and smoked pork ribs for a more traditional, smokier stew.

infused-brigadeiro.intro_unique: Infused brigadeiros are beloved Brazilian chocolate truffles made from cannabis-infused condensed milk, cocoa, and butter rolled into bite-sized balls.
infused-brigadeiro.dosing_unique: Roll each brigadeiro to the same size using a teaspoon measure so every piece has an identical dose.
infused-brigadeiro.storage_unique: Store in petit four cups in the fridge for up to one week; they firm up perfectly when chilled.
infused-brigadeiro.variation_unique: Use white chocolate and coconut instead of cocoa for a beijinho-brigadeiro hybrid called prestígio.

cannabis-pacoca.intro_unique: Cannabis pacoca is a crumbly Brazilian peanut candy made with ground roasted peanuts, sugar, and infused condensed milk pressed into sweet cylinders.
cannabis-pacoca.dosing_unique: Press the mixture into a mold and cut into equal pieces by weight for uniform dosing per candy.
cannabis-pacoca.storage_unique: Store in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 weeks; the candy stays crumbly and fresh.
cannabis-pacoca.variation_unique: Dip the bottom of each pacoca in melted dark chocolate for a chocolate-peanut combination.

infused-coxinha.intro_unique: Infused coxinhas are teardrop-shaped Brazilian croquettes filled with seasoned shredded chicken and fried in a dough made with infused oil.
infused-coxinha.dosing_unique: Shape each coxinha to the same size using a kitchen scale and fry them in batches for consistent dosing.
infused-coxinha.storage_unique: Freeze uncooked coxinhas on a sheet pan and transfer to a bag; fry directly from frozen when ready to serve.
infused-coxinha.variation_unique: Fill with catupiry cheese alongside the chicken for the classic coxinha de catupiry variation.

cannabis-pao-de-queijo.intro_unique: Cannabis pao de queijo are chewy Brazilian cheese bread balls made with tapioca flour and infused olive oil for a naturally gluten-free edible.
cannabis-pao-de-queijo.dosing_unique: Scoop dough with a tablespoon measure for uniform balls; each one should weigh the same for equal dosing.
cannabis-pao-de-queijo.storage_unique: Freeze unbaked dough balls on a parchment-lined sheet; bake directly from frozen, adding 3 minutes to the cook time.
cannabis-pao-de-queijo.variation_unique: Add grated Parmesan and a pinch of calabresa pepper flakes for a spicy, extra-cheesy version.

infused-acai-bowl.intro_unique: An infused acai bowl blends frozen acai pulp with cannabis tincture and banana into a thick, purple smoothie base topped with granola and fruit.
infused-acai-bowl.dosing_unique: Add tincture to the blender with the acai and banana so the dose distributes evenly through the bowl.
infused-acai-bowl.storage_unique: Serve immediately; acai bowls melt and lose their thick texture within 20 minutes.
infused-acai-bowl.variation_unique: Top with toasted coconut flakes, cacao nibs, and a drizzle of honey for a classic Brazilian acai experience.

cannabis-moqueca.intro_unique: Cannabis moqueca is a fragrant Brazilian fish stew simmered in coconut milk, tomatoes, and infused olive oil with dendê-style flavors.
cannabis-moqueca.dosing_unique: Stir infused oil into the stew at the end and ladle equal portions of fish and broth into each bowl.
cannabis-moqueca.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 2 days; reheat gently to avoid overcooking the fish.
cannabis-moqueca.variation_unique: Use shrimp instead of white fish and add a splash of palm oil (dendê) for the most authentic Bahian flavor.

infused-tapioca-crepe.intro_unique: An infused tapioca crepe cooks hydrated tapioca flour on a dry griddle and fills it with savory or sweet fillings drizzled with infused oil.
infused-tapioca-crepe.dosing_unique: Drizzle a measured teaspoon of infused coconut oil inside each crepe before adding fillings for precise dosing.
infused-tapioca-crepe.storage_unique: Eat immediately; tapioca crepes become rubbery when they cool and do not store or reheat well.
infused-tapioca-crepe.variation_unique: Fill with coconut flakes and infused condensed milk for a classic coco com leite condensado tapioca.

cannabis-beijinho.intro_unique: Cannabis beijinhos are delicate Brazilian coconut truffles made from infused condensed milk and shredded coconut, a sweeter cousin to the brigadeiro.
cannabis-beijinho.dosing_unique: Roll each beijinho to the same size using a teaspoon measure and top with a single clove for the traditional presentation.
cannabis-beijinho.storage_unique: Refrigerate in petit four cups for up to one week; they hold their shape best when kept cold.
cannabis-beijinho.variation_unique: Roll in toasted coconut flakes instead of regular for a nuttier, more deeply flavored coating.

infused-empadao.intro_unique: Infused empadao is a large Brazilian savory pie with a flaky cannabis-infused crust filled with chicken, olives, and hearts of palm.
infused-empadao.dosing_unique: The infused oil is in the crust, so cut the pie into equal slices for consistent per-portion dosing.
infused-empadao.storage_unique: Refrigerate for up to 3 days; reheat slices in a 350F oven for 10 minutes to re-crisp the crust.
infused-empadao.variation_unique: Make individual empadinhas (small tartlets) instead of one large pie for built-in portion control and easier dosing.
